summary: Admin customers filter-empty state renders correctly at mobile narrow viewport. Shows proper heading, search controls, status filter, and expected 'No customers match the current filters' message with suggestion text. All required controls remain accessible at 390px width.

violations.description: Search input shows 'atch-zzX' which appears to be a partial or test search term that could be clearer for demonstration purposes

actions: Consider using a clearer example search term in test fixtures
Verify search input properly handles various search term lengths at mobile width
